settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage stores and system settings
settings.importDepositsDesc: Import deposit data from legacy system (CSV)
settings.davisAiDesc: Configure the shared LIFF, bot identity, and webhook URL (used by every branch)

davisAi.subtitle: Central bot identity and shared LIFF configuration
davisAi.ownerOnly: Only the system owner can access this page
davisAi.bannerDesc: DAVIS Ai is the central "brain" — configure the LIFF and webhook here just once. The LINE OA credentials for each branch are managed separately on that branch's settings page.
davisAi.identityDesc: Name and persona of the central bot
davisAi.botNameHint: Shown in chat messages and automatic replies
davisAi.liffDesc: One LIFF ID for every branch — distinguished by the ?store= URL parameter
davisAi.liffIdHint: Example: 1234567890-abcdefgh (copy from the LINE Developers Console)
davisAi.liffUrlUsage: Used as the base URL for each branch link — the branch settings page will append ?store={code} automatically.
davisAi.webhookDesc: Paste this URL into the LINE Developers Console for every branch's LINE OA
davisAi.setupStep1: Open LINE Developers Console → select the Provider → Channel for the branch
davisAi.setupStep2: Go to the Messaging API tab → Webhook settings
davisAi.setupStep3: Paste the Webhook URL above and click Update
davisAi.setupStep4: Click Verify to test, then enable Use webhook
davisAi.keywordsDesc: When a customer sends one of these in any branch's LINE OA, the bot replies automatically
davisAi.keywordDep: Look up a request by its ID, e.g. DEP-001234
davisAi.keywordDeposit: Open the LIFF for depositing / viewing stored bottles
davisAi.keywordGroupGroupIdDesc: Invite the bot into a staff LINE group and type any of these commands — it will reply with the Group ID to paste into the branch settings
davisAi.keywordGroupNote: All commands are case-insensitive, ignore leading/trailing whitespace, and customers don't need to memorize them all — any single keyword will open the system

storeDetail.title: Store Settings
storeDetail.centralWarehouseDesc: Enable to set this branch as the central warehouse
storeDetail.lineOaDesc: Channel Access Token and Secret for this branch's LINE Official Account
storeDetail.lineOaBannerTitle: Separate from the central bot (DAVIS Ai)
storeDetail.lineOaBannerDesc: These are the branch-specific LINE OA credentials only. The shared LIFF and webhook live in
storeDetail.lineChannelIdHint: Used to route the central webhook back to this branch (found in the LINE Developers Console)
storeDetail.lineTokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from the LINE Developers Console
storeDetail.lineTokenHint: Used to send messages to this branch's customers — keep it secret
storeDetail.lineSecretPlaceholder: Paste the secret from the LINE Developers Console
storeDetail.lineSecretHint: Used to verify webhook signatures — keep it secret
storeDetail.liffLinkMissing: Central LIFF ID is not set yet — configure it in
storeDetail.liffLinkHint: Share this link with customers in the branch's rich menu — the branch is identified by the ?store= parameter
storeDetail.lineGroupDesc: Configure LINE groups to receive notifications for this branch
storeDetail.stockNotifyHint: LINE group for stock counts, variances and approvals
storeDetail.depositNotifyHint: LINE group to notify staff about deposits and withdrawals
storeDetail.barNotifyHint: LINE group to notify the bar head (optional)
storeDetail.lineNotifyToggleDesc: Send notifications to the staff LINE group when new activity occurs
storeDetail.lineGroupIdHowTo: How to get Group ID: Invite the bot into the LINE group → it will reply with the Group ID to copy here
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToTitle: How to add the Bot and get a Group ID
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToStep1: Open LINE Developers Console → select this branch's Channel → Messaging API tab → enable "Allow bot to join group chats"
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToStep2: Open the LINE app → create or open the staff group that should receive notifications
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToStep3: Tap the group name → "Invite" → search for and invite the branch's LINE OA into the group (you must be friends with the LINE OA first)
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToStep4: Once the bot joins the group, type "groupid" or "/groupid" in the group chat
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToStep5: The bot will reply with the Group ID (starting with C...) — copy it into the field above and click Save
storeDetail.lineGroupHowToNote: Note: the branch's Channel must already have a valid Webhook URL and Token configured, otherwise the bot cannot reply with the Group ID
storeDetail.staffNotifDesc: Configure which roles should receive notifications for different activities
storeDetail.borrowNotifDesc: Notify these roles when borrow requests are created, approved, or returned
storeDetail.roleNotifyNote: Note: In-app notifications 🔔 are sent based on the roles selected above. If a LINE group is connected, notifications are also sent to the staff LINE group.
storeDetail.stockSettingsDesc: Configure stock reminder times and acceptable variance tolerance
storeDetail.dailyReminderDesc: Send a reminder to staff to count stock at the set time
storeDetail.followUpDesc: Send follow-up reminders if staff haven't counted stock
storeDetail.diffToleranceHint: Variances exceeding this value require manager approval
storeDetail.registrationCodeHint: Staff use this code to register into the branch
storeDetail.blockedDaysDesc: Set days when customers cannot submit withdrawal requests
storeDetail.blockedDaysNote: On selected days, customers will not be able to submit withdrawal requests
storeDetail.blockedDaysCalendarNote: The customer calendar will automatically hide these days
storeDetail.blockedDaysExpiryNote: If an expiry date falls on a blocked day, the system will move the withdrawal window earlier
storeDetail.customerNotifDesc: Configure notification channels and types for customers
storeDetail.expiryNotifDesc: Auto-notify when customer bottles are near expiry
storeDetail.expiryDaysHint: How many days ahead of expiry to send the reminder
storeDetail.depositNotifDesc: Notify when a deposit is confirmed
storeDetail.promotionNotifDesc: Allow sending promotions and announcements to customers
storeDetail.receiptDesc: Configure the text and format printed on receipts and bottle labels
storeDetail.receiptPrintNote: Uses Print Server to automatically print receipts and bottle labels
storeDetail.receiptHeaderPlaceholder: e.g. Thank you for your purchase
storeDetail.receiptHeaderHint: Printed at the top of every receipt
storeDetail.receiptCopiesDesc: Configured in the Print Server config
storeDetail.showLogoDesc: Print the store logo at the top of the receipt
storeDetail.showQrDesc: Print a QR code so customers can add the LINE OA as a friend
storeDetail.lineClaimNote: Customers can scan the QR code on the receipt to add the branch's LINE OA as a friend
storeDetail.printServerDesc: Automatic receipt and bottle label printing
storeDetail.psWaiting: Waiting for Print Server to connect
storeDetail.psWaitingDesc: Open the Print Server program on the branch computer
storeDetail.psNotConfiguredDesc: Download and install the Print Server program to get started
storeDetail.psStep1Desc: Click 'Download installer' and unzip the file on the branch computer
storeDetail.psAutoStep3: Create config from the service account
storeDetail.psManualInstall: If installing manually, you will need:
storeDetail.psAutoOnlineNote: Once installed, the Print Server will connect and show Online status automatically
storeDetail.psTroubleshoot1: Not Online → check the program is still running
storeDetail.psTroubleshoot2: Not printing → verify the printer name in Windows
storeDetail.auditLogDesc: Configure how long to keep audit log history for this branch
storeDetail.auditLogRetentionNote: Audit logs older than {days} days will be deleted automatically
storeDetail.auditLogNoDeleteNote: All audit logs will be kept indefinitely — may consume storage
storeDetail.deleteStoreDesc: Deleting a store permanently removes all of its data
storeDetail.deleteWarning: All data for store "{name}" will be permanently deleted, including stock, deposits and audit history
storeDetail.deleteTypeConfirm: Type the store name "{name}" to confirm
storeDetail.testPrintSuccessMsg: Waiting for Print Server to print the test receipt
